title: Clarify Dosage current-use rubric and promote revised champion

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented Dosage rubric clarification in a clean feature worktree and pushed new score version e389ad22-d42d-4124-9201-2fcf2d264fe9. Clarification added: meds the customer says are not currently using / not in the pill box / not part of the current regimen are excluded from the SRX miss count; customer uncertainty does not count as successful dosage confirmation. Validation feedback evaluation 62af71ce-a7a6-4869-b2dc-8030391291b3 is materially weaker than the prior cleaned-slice champion (current run at 52/52 items, Accuracy 78.8462, Alignment 0.5783265757464061 vs prior 82.6923 / 0.653974121996303), but champion was manually promoted per requested rubric decision. New live champion: e389ad22-d42d-4124-9201-2fcf2d264fe9. Restarted Dosage optimizer with max-iterations 10 as procedure 4647ca6d-2624-4c01-9177-7c7403ed5920, task 01c4f711-b7fd-4b4d-aaef-2939ff08bae8, logging to /tmp/optimizer-dosage-current-use-20260423-10cycle.log.
